summary: Birth Plan feature fully tested. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 9 sections display correctly, modals open with proper form fields (text, textarea, multiselect), data persists correctly. 100% completion tracked accurately.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web Pressable components don't respond to Playwright direct clicks - known limitation from iterations 1 and 2. Workaround: use JavaScript click dispatch or API-based testing.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - minor deprecation warning from React Native Web

critical_code_review_comments: BirthPlanForms.tsx correctly implements all 9 sections from PDF specification
Form field types (text, textarea, multiselect, singleselect) render correctly
Section status updates from 'Not started' to 'Complete' when data is saved
Completion percentage calculates correctly (9 sections = ~11.11% per section)
API endpoints work correctly: GET /api/birth-plan, PUT /api/birth-plan/section/{id}, GET /api/birth-plan/export
Modal opens with correct form fields and pre-populated data

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Birth plan screen, modals, and form fields all working

seed_data_creation: All 9 birth plan sections populated via API tests with PDF-specification fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Birth plan feature fully tested and working. All 9 sections implemented per 'True Joy Birthing Fillout Form FINAL.pdf' specs. Form fields verified: text (Mother's Name, etc), textarea (Birth Support, Other Pain Management), multiselect (Pain Management options with checkboxes), singleselect (Yes/No radio buttons). To test frontend with Playwright, use API login via page.evaluate() to get session token, then set localStorage.setItem('session_token', TOKEN). React Native Web Pressable components don't respond to direct Playwright clicks.

Section Modal Forms - Field Types.multiselect_checkboxes: Working (Pain Management options show checked/unchecked states)
